name: Jais-13B
archDisplay: Dense GPT-3-style decoder-only transformer, trained from scratch with SwiGLU activations and ALiBi position encoding
note: First flagship open Arabic-English bilingual LLM, built with MBZUAI and trained on Cerebras' Condor Galaxy supercomputer.

results.notes: Arabic-translated ARC-Challenge (ARC-C), listed in the official HF model card's Arabic evaluation table alongside the already-recorded MMLU/HellaSwag/TruthfulQA rows.
Arabic-translated PIQA, from the same official HF model card Arabic evaluation table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via the official HF model card plus independent press (Cerebras/MBZUAI press releases, HPCwire) — all dated 2023-08-30, exactly matching the record. Confirmed 13B params, Apache 2.0 license, bilingual Arabic-English decoder-only transformer built by Inception/MBZUAI/Cerebras and trained on the Condor Galaxy-1 supercomputer. All three benchmark rows (MMLU 30.0, HellaSwag 57.7, TruthfulQA 41.1, Arabic evals) confirmed verbatim on the official HF model card.
